api.description: API routes should call application services and the API runtime dependency facade rather than concrete infrastructure or runtime composition modules.

application.description: Application services may orchestrate domain and ports but must not depend on HTTP/framework or concrete infrastructure.

domain.description: Domain must stay framework-free and independent from API, contract, and infrastructure modules.

runtime.description: Runtime composition may wire concrete adapters but must not depend on HTTP routes, DTOs, or framework modules.
